text.title: Persona Building Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable input signals onto a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: broaden recruit; single segment indicates sample bias
tighten kill criteria; segments >4 mean over-fragmented audience

example.trace: n=47 -> segments=3 -> ship primary + secondary + negative with >=5 quotes each.

text.example: Worked path from root-question to conclusion.
